title: UpsertMappingRequest
description: Request to upsert a mapping between a marketplace's sales channel and a seller's affiliate.

marketplaceSalesChannel.description: The sales channel of the marketplace to be associated with the seller's affiliate. It is linked to the seller's affiliate.

sellerChannel.description: The affiliate of the seller that will be associated with the marketplace's sales channel. Through the affiliate, the seller determines which of his sales channels will be used for the mapping.
